client.description: Independent specialty coffee shop focused on single-origin beans and a calm workspace atmosphere

editorial.tone: Warm, unhurried, sensory — like a good cup of coffee
editorial.voice: First person plural (we/our) — the shop speaking
editorial.audience: Remote workers, coffee enthusiasts, locals looking for a calm spot
editorial.cta_style: Inviting, low-pressure — 'come by', 'we'd love to see you'
editorial.notes: Always mention the neighborhood feel and community aspect

client.description: Boutique employment law firm specializing in wrongful termination and workplace discrimination cases
legal: Regulated by the Solicitors Regulation Authority

editorial.tone: Authoritative but human — serious without being intimidating
editorial.voice: Third person (the firm) for institutional content, first person for thought leadership
editorial.audience: Employees who believe their rights have been violated
editorial.cta_style: Empathetic and clear — 'speak with our team', 'free initial consultation'
editorial.notes: Always include a disclaimer that content is informational, not legal advice
